debug_info.goal:
α : Type
s : Skeleton
leaf_data_tree : LeafData α s
f : FunctionType (InductiveMerkleTree.spec α)
⊢ runWithOracle f (InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree α s leaf_data_tree) =
    InductiveMerkleTree.buildMerkleTree_with_hash α s leaf_data_tree fun left right => @f (left, right)

failed_attempts:
induction leaf_data_tree <;>
    simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, singleHash, *,
      runWithOracle_pure, runWithOracle_bind, runWithOracle_query]

induction s with
  | leaf =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.leaf a =>
      unfold buildMerkleTree
      simp only [runWithOracle_pure, buildMerkleTree_with_hash]
  | internal s_left s_right left_ih right_ih =>
    match leaf_data_tree with
    | LeafData.internal left right =>
      unfold buildMerkleTree
      simp [left_ih, right_ih, runWithOracle_bind]
      simp [singleHash, runWithOracle_query, runWithOracle_pure]
      rfl

induction leaf_data_tree with
  | leaf a =>
    simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_pure]
  | internal left right left_ih right_ih =>
    simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, left_ih, right_ih, runWithOracle_bind,
          singleHash, runWithOracle_query, runWithOracle_pure]

induction leaf_data_tree with
  | leaf a =>
    simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, runWithOracle_pure]
  | internal left right left_ih right_ih =>
    simp [buildMerkleTree, buildMerkleTree_with_hash, left_ih, right_ih,
      runWithOracle_bind, singleHash, runWithOracle_query, runWithOracle_pure]
